response.justification: Although Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with strong software craftsmanship fundamentals and some fintech exposure, he lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on the Windows platform. His expertise is predominantly in Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang, making him a poor technical fit for a role centered around C++ and SQL Server/Oracle in a fixed-income environment.
strengths: Extensive overall software development experience at a Staff/Senior level.
Strong background in software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD pipelines.
Prior exposure to the investment and capital domain through his work at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Fails to meet the mandatory requirement of 5-10 years of hands-on C++ experience.
Lacks experience with Windows platform development, focusing instead on web, Linux, and cross-platform tools.
No demonstrated experience with SQL Server, Oracle, or specific Fixed Income products.
